fragments.pinout.md#uart1: UART1: TX1 on PA9, RX1 on PA10. Shared with USB VCP when not remapped.
fragments.pinout.md#uart2: UART2: TX2 on PA2, RX2 on PA3. Default RX for SBUS receivers.
fragments.pinout.md#i2c1: I2C1: SCL on PB6, SDA on PB7. Populated by the onboard baro (BMP280) at 0x76.
fragments.connectors.md#jst-batt: JST-XH battery connector, 2-pin, positive lead nearest the USB port.
